common.name: Name
home.subtitle: Here, you can manage your OpenRAG deployment using various features, such as indexing files or inspecting Ray actors.
home.openrag_description: OpenRAG is a lightweight, modular and extensible Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework designed to explore and test advanced RAG techniques — 100% open source and focused on experimentation, not lock-in.
home.openrag_built_by: Built by LINAGORA, OpenRAG offers a sovereign-by-design alternative to mainstream RAG stacks.
home.indexer_card_description: Upload, delete or explore files and partitions
home.dashboard_card_description: Inspect and restart all the Ray actors
indexer.no_partitions: No partitions available. Please wait a bit for the partitions to be fetched, or start indexing files now.
indexer.confirm_delete_partitions:
You are about to delete {count} partitions.
Are you sure you want to proceed ?
indexer.upload_failed: Upload failed for {failed} out of {total} file(s) to partition "{partition}".
partition.no_files: No files available. Please wait a bit for the files to be fetched, or start indexing files now.
partition.confirm_delete_files:
You are about to delete {count} files.
Are you sure you want to proceed ?
file.select_extract: Select an extract to preview its content.
extract.title: Extract #{id} from {filename}
upload.title: Upload files
upload.metadata_plural: Add metadata common to every file
upload.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close the modal?
upload.no_matching_partitions: No matching partitions found. Check your spelling, or create a new one.
dashboard.restart_info: Restarting an actor will create a new instance, and the old one will be killed. This means that multiple instances will appear in the list.
